prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3813名、2026年小幅扩招2人（竞争略加剧）、软科 排名首次进入前50（吸引力增强）、本省考生总数明显增加（竞争加剧）等多重因素，扩招与排名上升效应部分对冲，但考生规模扩大对竞争压力的推升作用更为显著；预计2026 年最低位次约3918名，区间3418-4418名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 4169, in 2024 approximately 4476 (shifted back by about 307), in 2025 approximately 3813 (shifted forward by about 663), with significant fluctuations in the past three years, showing an alternating pattern of "backward-forward" shifts; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3813; the provincial science enrollment plan was 82 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 83 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 85, a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.4%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, with some candidates being admitted due to score fluctuations and having high satisfaction with school life; in 2026 reputation data, Southwest Jiaotong University was not listed separately, with overall public opinion stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 94th, rated as "average", with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious abnormal popularity signals; Transportation Engineering A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, both are the school's flagship disciplines, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Transportation and Civil Engineering, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation were both highly recommended in 2024, Computer Science is recommended but showing a cooling trend; Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated and wait-and-see, with clear divergence in popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 238,000 (including uncertain marks), a significant increase from 2025's liberal arts 24,010 + science 52,538 = 76,548, raising overall competitive pressure; compared to 2024's 390 points, it has risen by 31 points, indicating changes in exam difficulty or score standards; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the same western region as Xinjiang, with some regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates; the school's science enrollment in Xinjiang is relatively small (about 83 students), with limited impact on the province's enrollment landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3813, a slight expansion of 2 students in 2026 (slightly increased competition), the Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time (enhanced appeal), and a significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensified competition), the effects of expansion and ranking improvement partially offset each other, but the increase in candidate scale has a more significant effect on raising competitive pressure; the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is approximately 3918, with a range of 3418-4418.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3418-4418, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Transportation, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 3418), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Transportation (A+ discipline) and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended); for rankings near the upper limit (around 4418), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors for a stable application.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1048, in 2024 approximately 1048 (unchanged), and in 2025 approximately 1344 (shifted back by about 296 places). Rankings were stable around 1048 in the past two years but notably shifted back in 2025, indicating a significant trend of increasing competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1344. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 12 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 12 in 2025, and 12 in 2026, remaining unchanged for four consecutive years, with no supply-demand elasticity changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength, which also has a certain brand appeal for liberal arts candidates. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with some candidates expressing satisfaction with campus life after being admitted despite fluctuations in admission scores. In 2026, Southwest Jiaotong University was not listed separately in reputation data, with overall public sentiment stable. Douyin popularity ranking is 94th, rated as "average," with no abnormal popularity. Transportation Engineering (A+) and Civil Engineering (A) are the university's flagship programs. Although primarily engineering-focused, the 211 status and Double First-Class designation still support the application for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 shows divergence and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature in 2024 is recommended, Teacher Training/Education in 2024 shows divergence and wait-and-see. Overall, liberal arts major popularity is stable with a slight recommendation bias. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 238,000 (including uncertain markers), a significant increase compared to 2025's 24,010 liberal arts + 52,538 science = 76,548 candidates, leading to increased overall competition pressure. Compared to 2024's 425-point threshold, the score line standard has risen by 26 points. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, which, like Xinjiang, belongs to the western region, making it somewhat attractive to Xinjiang candidates in terms of regional preference. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Xinjiang is stable at 12, accounting for a small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1344, enrollment plan unchanged for four consecutive years (no expansion to alleviate competition), Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time (increased attractiveness), a significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensified competition), and the 2025 ranking already shifted back by about 296 places compared to the previous two years (continuing trend of intensified competition), the expansion of the candidate pool is the most critical factor driving up competition pressure. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 1374, with a range of 1168-1580.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1168-1580, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Law, Political Science and Public Administration) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Ideological and Political Education) as a safety option. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1168) can prioritize Chinese Language and Literature (higher recommendation popularity). Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 1580) are advised to choose Ideological and Political Education as a safe backup.
